case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION vs. HOFTVEDT, IVAR LEIF IND & DBA ILH CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE WICK, B. FIELDS, REPORTER. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOFTVEDT, IVAR LEIF IND & DBA ILH CONSTRUCTION $11,864.55 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,864.55, JUDGMENT SHALL BE PAID AS FOLLOWS: $1,000 ON OR BEFORE 10/15/94; $2,500 ON OR BEFORE 3/8/95; $2,500 ON OR BEFORE 9/8/95. IF DEFT. PAYS A TOTAL OF $6,000 AS SET FORTH, PLTF. SHALL CONSIDER THE $6,000 AS PAYMENT IN FULL AND PLTF, WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAIL
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
